description: Replicate and Fal model configuration definitions - universal configuration, task-independent

openai/gpt-image-1.description: A multimodal image generation model that creates high-quality images. You need to bring your own verified OpenAI key to use this model. Your OpenAI account will be charged for usage.

input_fidelity.description: Control how much effort the model will exert to match the style and features, especially facial features, of input images

input_images.description: A list of images to use as input for the generation

prompt.description: A text description of the desired image

aspect_ratio.description: The aspect ratio of the generated image

background.description: Set whether the background is transparent or opaque or choose automatically

quality.description: The quality of the generated image

user_id.description: An optional unique identifier representing your end-user. This helps OpenAI monitor and detect abuse.

google/nano-banana-pro.description: Google's state of the art image generation and editing model 🍌🍌

image_input.description: Input images to transform or use as reference (supports up to 14 images)

prompt.description: A text description of the image you want to generate

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image

safety_filter_level.description: block_low_and_above is strictest, block_medium_and_above blocks some prompts, block_only_high is most permissive but some prompts will still be blocked

bytedance/seedream-4.5.description: Seedream 4.5: Upgraded Bytedance image model with stronger spatial understanding and world knowledge

image_input.description: Input image(s) for image-to-image generation. List of 1-14 images for single or multi-reference generation.

aspect_ratio.description: Image aspect ratio. Only used when size is not 'custom'. Use 'match_input_image' to automatically match the input image's aspect ratio.

height.description: Custom image height (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

max_images.description: Maximum number of images to generate when sequential_image_generation='auto'. Range: 1-15. Total images (input + generated) cannot exceed 15.

sequential_image_generation.description: Group image generation mode. 'disabled' generates a single image. 'auto' lets the model decide whether to generate multiple related images (e.g., story scenes, character variations).

size.description: Image resolution: 2K (2048px), 4K (4096px), or 'custom' for specific dimensions. Note: 1K resolution is not supported in Seedream 4.5.

width.description: Custom image width (only used when size='custom'). Range: 1024-4096 pixels.

black-forest-labs/flux-2-max.description: The highest fidelity image model from Black Forest Labs

input_images.description: List of input images for image-to-image generation. Maximum 8 images. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image. Use 'match_input_image' to match the first input image's aspect ratio.

height.description: Height of the generated image. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32).

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality. Not relevant for .png outputs

resolution.description:
Resolution in megapixels. Up to 4 MP is possible, but 2 MP or below is recommended. The maximum image size is 2048x2048, which means that high-resolution images may not respect the resolution if aspect ratio is not 1:1.

Resolution is not used when aspect_ratio is 'custom'. When aspect_ratio is 'match_input_image', use 'match_input_image' to match the input image's resolution (clamped to 0.5-4 MP).

safety_tolerance.description: Safety tolerance, 1 is most strict and 5 is most permissive

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation

width.description: Width of the generated image. Only used when aspect_ratio=custom. Must be a multiple of 32 (if it's not, it will be rounded to nearest multiple of 32).

qwen/qwen-image-edit-2511.description: An enhanced version over Qwen-Image-Edit-2509, featuring multiple improvements including notably better consistency

image.description: Images to use as reference. Must be jpeg, png, gif, or webp.

prompt.description: Text instruction on how to edit the given image.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio for the generated image.

disable_safety_checker.description: Disable safety checker for generated images.

go_fast.description: Run faster predictions with additional optimizations.

output_quality.description: Quality when saving the output images, from 0 to 100. 100 is best quality, 0 is lowest quality. Not relevant for .png outputs.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation.

google/veo-3.1.description: New and improved version of Veo 3, with higher-fidelity video, context-aware audio, reference image and last frame support

image.description: Input image to start generating from. Ideal images are 16:9 or 9:16 and 1280x720 or 720x1280, depending on the aspect ratio you choose.

last_frame.description: Ending image for interpolation. When provided with an input image, creates a transition between the two images.

negative_prompt.description: Description of what to exclude from the generated video

reference_images.description: 1 to 3 reference images for subject-consistent generation (reference-to-video, or R2V). Reference images only work with 16:9 aspect ratio and 8-second duration. Last frame is ignored if reference images are provided.

seed.description: Random seed. Omit for random generations

google/veo-3.1-fast.description: New and improved version of Veo 3 Fast, with higher-fidelity video, context-aware audio and last frame support

image.description: Input image to start generating from. Ideal images are 16:9 or 9:16 and 1280x720 or 720x1280, depending on the aspect ratio you choose.

last_frame.description: Ending image for interpolation. When provided with an input image, creates a transition between the two images.

negative_prompt.description: Description of what to exclude from the generated video

seed.description: Random seed. Omit for random generations

bytedance/seedance-2.0.description: ByteDance's multimodal video generation model with native audio, image-to-video support, and optional image/video/audio references.

image.description: Input image for image-to-video generation (first frame). Cannot be combined with reference images.

last_frame_image.description: Input image for last frame generation. Only works if a first frame image is also provided. Cannot be combined with reference images.

reference_images.description: Reference images (up to 9) for character consistency, style guidance, and scene composition.

reference_videos.description: Reference videos (up to 3) for motion transfer, style reference, and editing.

reference_audios.description: Reference audio files (up to 3) for audio-driven generation and lip-sync.

duration.description: Video duration in seconds. Set to -1 for intelligent duration.

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. Use adaptive to let the model choose based on inputs.

generate_audio.description: Generate synchronized audio with the video.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation

wan-video/wan-2.6-i2v.description: Alibaba Wan 2.6 image to video generation model

duration.description: Duration of the generated video in seconds

enable_prompt_expansion.description: If set to true, the prompt optimizer will be enabled

multi_shots.description: Enable intelligent multi-shot segmentation (only active when enable_prompt_expansion is enabled). True enables multi-shot segmentation, false generates single-shot content.

negative_prompt.description: Negative prompt to avoid certain elements

openai/sora-2.description: OpenAI's Flagship video generation with synced audio

prompt.description: A text description of the video to generate

input_reference.description: An optional image to use as the first frame of the video. The image must be the same aspect ratio as the video.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the video. Portrait is 720x1280, landscape is 1280x720

openai_api_key.description: Optional: Your OpenAI API key. If you use your own OpenAI API key, you will be charged directly by OpenAI.

seconds.description: Duration of the video in seconds

lucataco/wan-2.2-first-last-frame.description: Wan 2.2 First and Last Frame using 8-step inference w/ Lightning LoRA

prompt.description: Prompt describing the transition between images

negative_prompt.default: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走,过曝，

seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility (None for random)

kwaivgi/kling-v2.6.description: Kling 2.6 Pro: Top-tier image-to-video with cinematic visuals, fluid motion, and native audio generation

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the video. Ignored if start_image is provided.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds

generate_audio.description: Generate audio for the video. When enabled, the model will create synchronized audio based on the video content.

negative_prompt.description: Things you do not want to see in the video

bytedance/seedance-1.5-pro.description: A joint audio-video model that accurately follows complex instructions.

last_frame_image.description: Input image for last frame generation. This only works if an image start frame is given too.

aspect_ratio.description: Video aspect ratio. Ignored if an image is used.

generate_audio.description: Generate audio synchronized with the video. When enabled, the model outputs a video with audio that matches the visuals.

seed.description: Random seed. Set for reproducible generation

minimax/speech-02-hd.description: Text-to-Audio (T2A) that offers voice synthesis, emotional expression, and multilingual capabilities. Optimized for high-fidelity applications like voiceovers and audiobooks.

text.description: Text to narrate (max 10,000 characters). Use markers like <#0.5#> to insert pauses in seconds.

audio_format.description: File format for the generated audio. Choose mp3 for general use, wav/flac for lossless, or pcm for raw bytes.

bitrate.description: MP3 bitrate in bits per second. Only used when audio_format is mp3.

channel.description: mono for 1 channel (default), stereo for 2 channels.

emotion.description: Desired delivery style. Use auto to let MiniMax choose, or pick a specific emotion.

english_normalization.description: Improve number/date reading for English text (adds a small amount of latency).

language_boost.description: Optional language hint. Choose Automatic to let MiniMax detect the language, or pick a specific locale.

pitch.description: Semitone offset applied to the voice (−12 to +12).

speed.description: Speech speed multiplier (0.5–2.0). Lower is slower, higher is faster.

subtitle_enable.description: Return MiniMax subtitle metadata with sentence timestamps (non-streaming only).

voice_id.description: Voice to synthesize. Pick any MiniMax system voice or a voice_id returned by https://replicate.com/minimax/voice-cloning.

volume.description: Relative loudness. 1.0 is default MiniMax gain. Range 0–10.

minimax/speech-02-turbo.description: Text-to-Audio (T2A) that offers voice synthesis, emotional expression, and multilingual capabilities. Designed for real-time applications with low latency

text.description: Text to narrate (max 10,000 characters). Use markers like <#0.5#> to insert pauses in seconds.

audio_format.description: File format for the generated audio. Choose mp3 for general use, wav/flac for lossless, or pcm for raw bytes.

bitrate.description: MP3 bitrate in bits per second. Only used when audio_format is mp3.

channel.description: mono for 1 channel (default), stereo for 2 channels.

emotion.description: Desired delivery style. Use auto to let MiniMax choose, or pick a specific emotion.

english_normalization.description: Improve number/date reading for English text (adds a small amount of latency).

language_boost.description: Optional language hint. Choose Automatic to let MiniMax detect the language, or pick a specific locale.

pitch.description: Semitone offset applied to the voice (−12 to +12).

speed.description: Speech speed multiplier (0.5–2.0). Lower is slower, higher is faster.

subtitle_enable.description: Return MiniMax subtitle metadata with sentence timestamps (non-streaming only).

voice_id.description: Voice to synthesize. Pick any MiniMax system voice or a voice_id returned by https://replicate.com/minimax/voice-cloning.

volume.description: Relative loudness. 1.0 is default MiniMax gain. Range 0–10.

google/lyria-2.description: Lyria 2 is a music generation model that produces 48kHz stereo audio through text-based prompts

negative_prompt.description: Description of what to exclude from the generated audio

seed.description: Random seed. Omit for random generations

minimax/music-1.5.description: Music-1.5: Full-length songs (up to 4 mins) with natural vocals & rich instrumentation

prompt.description: Control music generation with a text prompt. Valid input: 10-300 characters.

lyrics.description:
Lyrics. Use 
 to separate lines. Supports [intro][verse][chorus][bridge][outro]. Valid input: 10-600 characters.

sample_rate.description: Sample rate for the generated music

meta/musicgen.description: Generate music from a prompt or melody

prompt.description: A description of the music you want to generate.

classifier_free_guidance.description: Increases the influence of inputs on the output. Higher values produce lower-varience outputs that adhere more closely to inputs.

continuation.description: If `True`, generated music will continue from `input_audio`. Otherwise, generated music will mimic `input_audio`'s melody.

continuation_end.description: End time of the audio file to use for continuation. If -1 or None, will default to the end of the audio clip.

continuation_start.description: Start time of the audio file to use for continuation.

duration.description: Duration of the generated audio in seconds.

input_audio.description: An audio file that will influence the generated music. If `continuation` is `True`, the generated music will be a continuation of the audio file. Otherwise, the generated music will mimic the audio file's melody.

multi_band_diffusion.description: If `True`, the EnCodec tokens will be decoded with MultiBand Diffusion. Only works with non-stereo models.

seed.description: Seed for random number generator. If None or -1, a random seed will be used.

temperature.description: Controls the 'conservativeness' of the sampling process. Higher temperature means more diversity.

top_k.description: Reduces sampling to the k most likely tokens.

top_p.description: Reduces sampling to tokens with cumulative probability of p. When set to  `0` (default), top_k sampling is used.

notes.purpose: Define input keys and parameters for all Replicate models
notes.usage: Workflow loads this configuration at runtime to understand input/output interface of each model
